citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries, or signpost you to a person or service to help you further
ENSA Advice ... can offer the following: Advice on how to find accommodation ... Look over leases and tenancy agreements ... Advice on tenant rights and responsibilities
Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The brochure describes a private accommodation support service and ENSA Advice, including contact details and types of assistance offered.
No evidence in the provided materials that the brochure was provided to Anfal.
No evidence in the provided materials that Anfal accessed the accommodation support service or ENSA Advice.
Only one source (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided for this task; other matter sources (e.g., email, case notes, accommodation records) were not included in the context pack.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Evidence Search Result: Brochure Provision and Support Service Access by Anfal

**Task:** T-NAP-SRC-0014-002-FU
**Source searched:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)
**Prior artifact reviewed:** art-5b589b506922422d93523c3a6c4a54eb (Evidence Gap: Brochure Provision and Service Access)

## Findings

- The brochure describes a private accommodation support service and ENSA Advice, including contact details and types of assistance offered. (Supported, cit-001 to cit-004)
- No evidence in the provided materials that the brochure was provided to Anfal. (Uncertain)
- No evidence in the provided materials that Anfal accessed the accommodation support service or ENSA Advice. (Uncertain)

## Limitation

Only one source (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided for this task. Other matter sources (e.g., email, case notes, accommodation records) were not included in the context pack.

## Recommendation

A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.
proposed_artifacts.title: Brochure Provision and Service Access Search Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the following matter sources for any records indicating that the Private Accommodation Brochure (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided to Anfal, or that Anfal contacted the accommodation support service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) or ENSA Advice (ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk / 0131 229 8791). Sources to search include: email correspondence, case notes, accommodation records, student support records, and any other relevant documents. Report any evidence found, or confirm absence of evidence.
proposed_tasks.title: Search other matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.text: Absence of evidence of brochure provision or service access by Anfal may create a gap in demonstrating that the university fulfilled its duty to inform/support.

summary: Searched provided context for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. No evidence found in the single source (NAP-SRC-0014 brochure) or the prior evidence-map artifact. The brochure describes available services but does not mention Anfal or any specific student. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources (e.g., email, case notes, accommodation records) for evidence of brochure provision or service contact by Anfal.

uncertainties.text: Whether the brochure was provided to Anfal is unknown from the provided materials.
Whether Anfal contacted the accommodation support service or ENSA Advice is unknown from the provided materials.
Other matter sources that may contain records of brochure provision or service access were not included in this context pack.
